briefing.say: Verdant Hollow's weather relay is dark, Ensign. Their crop won't wait on ceremony.
One sniffer, signed out to you. Bring it back un-melted.
Take Cog. Take Solace. See it done.

look.text: Verdant Hollow turns below, green as bottle glass.

use.text: It is not, despite appearances, a window you can open.

look.text: Cog's station. The readouts are alphabetised, cross-indexed, and gently humming.

use.text: It politely declines input from anyone below lieutenant.

look.text: The beam pad. It tingles even to look at.

use.text: The bridge dissolves into warm gold static.
Bramble, without looking up from her tea: "The WHOLE team, Ensign."

itemUse.text: The sniffer reads the pad and emits a long, uneasy tone. Some things are not meant to be smelled mid-transport.

look.text: Captain Bramble. Silver hair, steel spine, nettle tea — scalding.

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "Point that at me again, Ensign, and I'll have it analysing the brig."

look.text: Lt. Cog: chrome, courteous, one joke held in reserve.
Counselor Solace, wrapped in lavender calm.
